description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms and a slightly distorted torso. The figure is dressed in a collared, button-up shirt with a badge on the left chest, paired with belted pants and sneakers. The shirt is fitted and the pants are loose, with the shoes featuring a thick sole and visible laces. The figure's hair is short and swept to one side, giving a modern, youthful appearance. The arms are unusually long, extending well past the knees, and the hands are open and relaxed. The overall appearance is humanoid but with clear stylization and anatomical exaggeration, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with exaggeratedly long arms, wearing a collared shirt, belted pants, and sneakers, and sporting short swept hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt with badge, belted pants, and the figure's open hands and stylized long arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the extreme length of the arms and the profile of the swept hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, belt, and pants, as well as the back of the shoes and the figure's posture.
description_view_3: Right side view again emphasizes the elongated arm and the side profile of the head and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up collared shirt with badge, belted straight-leg pants, and casual sneakers
attribute_posture: standing with arms extended downward and outward
